label: ES44AC 8754 — smoke from #3 power assembly
initial_symptoms: Crew reports smoke from the #3 power assembly during notch 7 climb out of yard 4. Smell of burnt oil at the cab vent.

label: UP 7416 — air-brake leak after relay replacement
initial_symptoms: Class I brake test failed: brake pipe leakage 7 psi/min after the 26-L relay valve was replaced last shift. Tech needs to re-check.
fault_dump_raw:

2026-05-01 14:05:48 ABT-CLASS-I  FAIL            Class I test aborted at brake pipe stage
